children.text: Take our 20 second tour to get time-saving tips, sync favorites across devices and prove you're awesome.
Pan and zoom in the map until you can see nearby stops.
Tap this to see live times from this stop.
Tap this to move the map to your current location.
It's easy to look up a place or plan your journey home.
Tap this to search for places, transport, routes and more.
Tap this to get home, get to work, or plan another journey.
